title: Fix application error in live/production deployment

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the application error that occurs when the app is accessed in the live/production environment. The app must load without any runtime or initialization errors for all users (authenticated and anonymous).

quotes: I am getting application error in live itself

acceptanceCriteria: The live/production app loads without any error screen or blank page for anonymous users
The live/production app loads without any error screen or blank page for authenticated users
Internet Identity login flow completes successfully in production
Academic module, Coding module, Data Management, and User Management tabs all render correctly in production
No console errors related to actor initialization, canister calls, or missing state on first load

requirements.text: Ensure the backend migration module (migration.mo) is correctly applied on canister upgrade so that existing state (including the old single `subgroup` field) is properly transformed to the new `scienceSubgroup` and `commerceSubgroup` fields without causing a trap or error during post-upgrade.
acceptanceCriteria: All previously saved academic entries are accessible after upgrade
Entries with old `subgroup` field are correctly migrated to `scienceSubgroup` / `commerceSubgroup`
No data loss occurs during migration

requirements.text: Ensure the frontend handles cases where the backend actor is not yet ready or returns an error during initialization, displaying a user-friendly loading or error state instead of a blank/broken screen.
acceptanceCriteria: A loading indicator is shown while the backend actor is initializing
A clear, user-friendly error message is shown if the backend cannot be reached
The app does not show a blank white screen under any initialization failure scenario

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing features from Version 67 including Science subgroups (PCM-Psych, PCMCs, PCMB) and Commerce subgroups (CEBA, SEBA)
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what was present in Version 67
Changing the data schema beyond what is already defined in migration.mo
